name: ASUS TUF GAMING B650E-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
